feed.reason:
Hi HN, I'm Robel. I built LogClaw because I was tired of paying for Datadog and still waking up to pages that said "something is wrong" with no context.

LogClaw is an open-source log intelligence platform that runs on Kubernetes. It ingests logs via OpenTelemetry
feed.title: Show HN: LogClaw – Open-source AI SRE that auto-creates tickets from logs
